name: Banana Sour Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and sugar until well combined.
2. Add the egg and egg whites to the mixture. Beat until smooth.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, beating until just mixed.
5. Stir in the mashed bananas and yogurt until well incorporated.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 13"x9" baking pan.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40-45 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool on a wire rack before serving.
